app.title: Sayane
profile.label: Profile
capture.clipboard_error: Could not read the clipboard. Check browser permissions or capture a selection instead.
capture.clipboard_hint: Selecting lines in an editor is not enough — copy only the lines you want (⌘C / Ctrl+C), then capture.
capture.clipboard_preview_terms: Clipboard: important_terms {count} entries ({lines} lines / {chars} chars) — this will be captured
capture.clipboard_confirm_many: The clipboard contains {count} important_terms entries. Differences from stored context will be checked after Capture. Continue?
capture.clipboard_confirm_many_preflight: The clipboard lists {total} important_terms ({existing} already in the saved profile, {added} new). Continue Capture?
capture.clipboard_confirm_cancelled: Capture cancelled. Check what you copied, then try again.
capture.page_hint: Page capture may include UI and navigation text. Prefer selection capture for important context.
capture.warning.page_low_confidence: Note: Page capture may include UI navigation noise.
capture.warning.full_persona_document: Full persona YAML detected in clipboard. Copy only the section you intend to update.
insert.preview_note: DOM adapter only (local-custom). Bridge compile not supported.
candidate.label: Candidate
candidate.revise_hint: This edits a Sayane stored-context update candidate. It does not modify LLM memory.
candidate.revise_created: Revised candidate created. Refresh the list.
page.detail.open_supported: Open a supported site tab (e.g. ChatGPT).
page.detail.cs_reload: If you reloaded the extension, reload the target page too.
page.reason.content_script_unavailable: Content script is not responding. If you reloaded the extension, reload the target page too. If it still fails, check the content script bundle and manifest configuration.
page.reason.extractor_failed: Failed to extract page body on {provider}. Reload the page.
page.reason.not_readable: Page body is not readable enough.
page.reason.host_permission: This URL is outside extension host permissions.
page.reason.extension_page_active: An extension page (Options) is active. Focus a ChatGPT (or supported) tab.
diff.title: Diff Viewer
diff.error.fetch_failed: Could not fetch diff. Check Local Bridge status, Bridge URL, and token.
options.title: Sayane Settings
options.hint: Run sayane serve locally. Copy the bearer token from ~/.sayane/bridge.token (pairing code shown on first start).
options.developer_mode_hint: When enabled, low-confidence page capture appears in the popup for debugging.
options.show_debug_ui_hint: When enabled, shows popup bridge check, page recheck, diagnostics panel, and the side panel Debug filter.
error.bridge_token: Bridge token not configured. Set it in Options.
error.restricted_page: Cannot capture on this page. Open a normal https:// page, reload the tab if you updated the extension, then try again.
detail.evaluation_note: RDE and UIB are review aids, not automatic decisions.
detail.critical_override_warning: This candidate is classified as critical. Override only if you can explain why.
detail.critical_override_confirm: I understand this critical warning and want to override it.
detail.critical_override_confirm_dialog: This will override a critical RDE warning. Continue?
detail.force_critical_section_warning: Section "{section}" is a protected profile area. Approve only after reviewing the diff, with explicit confirmation and a reason.
detail.force_critical_section_confirm: I understand merging into "{section}" and want to approve after review.
review.approve_explicit_check_and_reason: Check the confirmation box and enter a reason before approving.
review.action.explicit_confirm_before_ap: Check the confirmation box and enter a reason before approving.
detail.merge_section_blocked: Section "{section}" cannot be merged automatically. Edit the profile manually.
error.merge_section_unsupported: This candidate type is not supported for automatic save yet. Section "{section}" needs implementation.
error.merge_section_unsupported_short: This candidate type is not supported for automatic save yet. A save target section still needs implementation.
error.merge_section_unsupported_named: Section "{section}" is not supported for automatic save yet.
error.generic: The operation failed. Restart the Bridge or try again shortly.
error.invalid_candidate_transition: This candidate cannot be approved, evaluated, or rejected in its current state. Refresh the list.
error.approve_requires_evaluate: Cannot approve before evaluation. Run Evaluate first.
error.unsafe_rde_category: Cannot approve with this evaluation result ({category}).
error.requires_force_critical: Approving section "{section}" requires the confirmation checkbox and reason in the detail panel.
detail.unknown_section_warning: This candidate targets an unknown or unexpected section: {section}
uib.UD.description: Uncertainty detection. Interpret as a review aid, not a decision.
uib.MI.description: Material integrity. Interpret as a review aid, not a decision.
uib.CH.description: Coherence. Interpret as a review aid, not a decision.
uib.DT.description: Diegetic truthfulness. Interpret as a review aid, not a decision.
uib.VP.description: Value preservation. Interpret as a review aid, not a decision.
uib.FG.description: Factual grounding. Interpret as a review aid, not a decision.
sidepanel.title: Sayane — Candidate review
sidepanel.context_banner: Comparison against your saved Sayane context. This is not LLM memory.
popup.review_hint: Open the side panel to review candidates against your saved Sayane context.
review.empty_no_candidates_from_capture: No new Candidates were created from this Capture. The content may already match stored context, or no extractable Candidate was found.
review.empty_no_candidates: No Candidates yet. Capture from a page or clipboard to start.
review.persona_dump_warning: Structured persona document detected. Do not bulk-approve; split into short units such as interests, concepts, or dev environment before saving.
review.capture_scope_mismatch: Capture excerpt is short but proposals look like a full persona. The clipboard may still hold a previously copied full YAML document.
review.full_persona_capture_warning: Full persona document detected in this clipboard capture. Copy only the section you intend to update, then capture again.
review.important_terms_large_capture: This capture lists {count} important_terms entries. Confirm you copied only the lines you meant to edit (the clipboard may still hold a longer YAML block).
review.clipboard_many_important_terms: This capture includes many important_terms from the clipboard. Re-copy a shorter block and capture again if that was not intended.
review.session_many_terms_redo: This review has {count} important_terms entries. To capture only a few lines, copy just those lines (⌘C / Ctrl+C) and run clipboard capture again (the session shown may be from an older capture).
review.action.important_terms_remove: Recommended: review items to remove, provide a reason, then approve
review.risk.important_terms_add: Adds important_terms items only; existing terms are unchanged.
review.risk.important_terms_remove: Proposes removal of important_terms items. Review the items to remove, then approve with explicit confirmation and a reason.
review.risk.persona_ir_split: IR candidate from structured persona. Review the storage policy before approving.
review.class.tooltip.reject_recommended: May distort saved context if approved as-is. Consider rejecting.
review.class.tooltip.sensitive_review: May contain sensitive info, third-party data, or bulk persona content. Review carefully.
review.class.tooltip.conflict: Differs from or overlaps existing saved context. Check the conflict.
review.class.tooltip.meaning_changed: Would change meaning of saved context. Confirm the change is intended.
review.class.tooltip.inferred_extension: Content inferred from capture, not stated verbatim. May not be explicitly present in source.
review.class.tooltip.new_candidate: Not yet evaluated against saved context. Run evaluation before deciding.
review.class.tooltip.duplicate_or_confir: Already present in saved context or no change needed. No approval required.
review.class.tooltip.low_value: Low impact or already resolved. Safe to ignore if not needed.
review.action.conflict: Recommended: check diff against saved context
review.action.meaning_changed: Recommended: confirm meaning change is intended
review.action.low_value: Recommended: low priority; review only if needed
review.risk.reject_recommended: May distort saved context if approved as-is.
review.risk.sensitive_review: May include sensitive, third-party, or bulk persona content.
review.risk.conflict: Differs from or overlaps existing saved context.
review.risk.meaning_changed: Would change meaning of saved context.
review.risk.inferred_extension: Content was inferred from capture, not stated verbatim.
review.risk.new_candidate: Not yet evaluated against saved context.
review.risk.duplicate_or_confirmed: Likely already present in saved context.
review.approve_blocked_hint: Expand details to review before approving this candidate.
review.approve_will_evaluate_hint: Not evaluated yet. Approve will run evaluation first.
review.approve_expand_to_evaluate_hint: Expand details to evaluate before approve.
review.evaluate_before_approve_done: Evaluation complete. Review the result, then approve if appropriate.
review.approve_requires_evaluation: Cannot approve before evaluation. Run Evaluate first.
review.approve_blocked_after_eval: This evaluation cannot be approved as-is. Review the classification and diff.
review.approve_blocked_rde_preserved: Cannot approve: classified as “{category}” (no change or approval not needed). Checking the box and entering a reason does not enable approve.
review.approve_blocked_rde_unresolved_ga: Cannot approve: classified as “{category}”. Resolve the diff or reject. Checking the box and entering a reason does not enable approve.
review.approve_blocked_rde_suspicious_dr: Cannot approve: classified as “{category}”. Review the meaning of proposed additions and the diff; reject if needed. Checking the box and entering a reason does not enable approve.
review.approve_blocked_rde_critical_dist: Cannot approve as-is: classified as “{category}” (critical distortion).
review.approve_already_approved: This candidate has already been approved.
review.approve_already_rejected: This candidate has already been rejected.
review.approve_unavailable_generic: This candidate cannot be approved right now.
review.approve_not_found: Candidate not found. Refresh the list.
review.approve_evaluate_failed: Evaluation failed, so approve is not available. Try Evaluate again.
